task: Make Day 1 AI tool switch update immediately in the UI

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, real entrypoint verification, and completion evidence guard for code, UI, deploy, and customer-facing changes.
Production changes require source-of-truth deploy flow, actual user-facing or runtime verification, and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

changes: Added a localPreferredLlm UI state so Day 1 tool chips update immediately when clicked instead of waiting for a server round trip.
Day1PracticeLab now derives selected chip styling, installation steps, fallback action, and the install tool card from the local selected tool override.
The server remains the persistence layer, but stale autosave or claim-device responses can no longer visually revert the user's just-clicked tool selection.
Typed ui_state.preferred_llm in the edu app client state.
